notes: German specialty chemicals powerhouse with a comprehensive hair care portfolio spanning scalp actives, conditioning agents, and delivery systems. Evonik's Carebiotics® are innovative microbiome-friendly actives for scalp health, while their TEGO® Betain series are benchmark amphoteric surfactants for mild hair cleansing. Their active delivery systems enhance the efficacy of hair care actives, and their strong R&D pipeline ensures a continuous stream of next-generation hair care innovations.
